commit.message: 8379816: Use unsigned return types for ci accessors and add braces

8379816: Use datacount64 naming for wide computation

Rename uint64_t variable to datacount64, then assign to size_t
datacount after the overflow check to avoid downstream casts.

8216486: Use unsigned types and add overflow check

Per review: use checked_cast<uint> for locals, uint64_t for datacount,
and bail out conservatively if allocation size overflows size_t.

8216486: Fix integer overflow in BCEscapeAnalyzer::iterate_blocks

Bail out conservatively if datacount overflows size_t.

8216486: Use int64_t instead of size_t for datacount

Per review feedback, use an explicit 64-bit type for the overflow fix.

8216486: Fix integer overflow in BCEscapeAnalyzer::iterate_blocks

Use size_t for datacount and datasize to prevent integer overflow
when numblocks, stkSize and numLocals are large. The product
(numblocks + 1) * (stkSize + numLocals) can exceed INT_MAX with
max classfile values (65535 each).
